poor: Your room is fighting the music harder than you'd like. Let's fix that.
okay: Solid starting point — a few targeted changes will unlock a lot here.
good: Good room. The foundations are there; it's about fine-tuning now.
excellent: Excellent result. Your room is working with the sound, not against it.

poor: Significant peaks and dips — bass modes are dominating the response.
okay: Some peaks and dips present. Treatment or placement can smooth these.
good: Reasonably flat response. Minor modal issues remain.
excellent: Very flat response. Excellent modal control.

poor: Strong early reflections are blurring the image and muddying transients.
okay: Reflections are present but manageable. Side and ceiling absorption helps.
good: Reflections are well controlled. Imaging should be solid.
excellent: Excellent reflection control. The direct sound dominates cleanly.

poor: Low-frequency support is weak. The room isn't reinforcing bass effectively.
okay: Bandwidth is limited in places. Subwoofer or room treatment may help.
good: Good bandwidth. The room delivers solid low-frequency support.
excellent: Full, extended bandwidth. Excellent low-end foundation.

poor: Left/right tonal balance is off. Check speaker symmetry and room layout.
okay: Minor balance asymmetry. Offset listening position may be the cause.
good: Good left/right balance. The stereo field should be centred and stable.
excellent: Near-perfect stereo balance. The room is symmetrical where it counts.

poor: Highly uneven response — strong comb filtering or flutter echo present.
okay: Some spectral roughness. Diffusion or additional absorption will help.
good: Smooth response overall. No serious colouration issues detected.
excellent: Exceptionally smooth response. The room adds very little colouration.

poor: Clarity is poor — late reflections are masking transient detail.
okay: Clarity is average. Tightening the reflection control will help definition.
good: Good clarity. Transients come through cleanly.
excellent: Excellent clarity. The room preserves fine transient detail beautifully.
